displayNameZh: 复杂流行音乐能改编吗？
summary: Yt Audio Complex Pop Question component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的「复杂流行音乐能改编吗？」组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-audio-complex-pop-question/src/YtAudioComplexPopQuestion.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `YtAudioComplexPopQuestion` and `ytAudioComplexPopQuestionDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Audio Complex Pop Question Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-audio-complex-pop-question to my project. Preserve the exported YtAudioComplexPopQuestionProps API and register the YtAudioComplexPopQuestion composition with the default props.
